title: What Sits Behind a Credible QP Declaration
alt: Checklist of evidence a QP needs before signing a declaration

items.label: Current API site audit
items.desc: Recent, on-site audit against EU GMP, including Part II

items.label: Effective quality system
items.desc: Change control, deviations, CAPA, ALCOA+ data integrity

items.label: Clear supply-chain map
items.desc: Every manufacturing and testing site in scope identified

items.label: Equivalence rationale
items.desc: Documented case for GMP equivalence; gaps controlled

items.label: Contamination control
items.desc: Annex 1 strategy for sterile and high-risk products
